def average_color(colors):  
    total_r = 0  
    total_g = 0  
    total_b = 0  
    for r, g, b in colors:  
        total_r += r  
        total_g += g  
        total_b += b  
    average_r = total_r // len(colors)  
    average_g = total_g // len(colors)  
    average_b = total_b // len(colors)  
    return (average_r, average_g, average_b)
